text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought Mejiro McQueen would return to her
dorm after training today, but strangely enough,
she's returned here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I need to continue building up my
strength. Please, will you extend today's training
session?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...On my way back, I happened upon Ryan, who
said she was on her way to begin training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I cannot allow myself to rest knowing she's out
there putting in more work.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My aim is to always maintain a magnificent lead. I
cannot afford to fall behind.
choice_data_list: Well, let's chase after that goal, then!

I can't allow it. An extension wouldn't prove
efficient.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! I'm glad you understand how
I feel.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Keep a steady eye on me. I won't try to do the
impossible, but I will try to do my best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Within reasonable limits, Mejiro McQueen and I
continue with our training for the day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
One might say I'm overworking myself, but it
would be more of a waste to ignore this current
surge of energy!
choice_data_list: There's no need to rush things.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No, perhaps I have lost a bit of my composure.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would further lose the path forward if I cannot
practice self-discipline. Dignity is one of the core
tenets of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen heeds my concern and returns to
her dorm.
